case_title: ANDREW K. DUFFY VS. KENNETH WILLIAM GERBER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUFFY, ANDREW K. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GERBER, KENNETH WILLIAM (JAKE) $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $755.00, PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED THAT DEFENDANT FAILED TO REPAY $650.00 OF THE HELD SECURITY DEPOSIT. THE REMAINDER IS WAIVED FOR FAILING TO DEMAND IT IN THE CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
